01-reopening-rally.html.excerpt: S&P closed +0.44% to 6,611.83 despite $112 oil and a 178K jobs report. The market is pricing in an Iran ceasefire before it's confirmed.

02-section-232-day-one.html.excerpt: The new Section 232 tariff structure took effect April 6. Here's who wins, who loses, and why it's industrial policy dressed as trade policy.

03-ism-services-prices.html.excerpt: ISM Services Prices Paid hit 70.7%, a 42-month high, while Services Employment dropped to 45.2%. Stagflation-lite just killed the Fed pivot.

04-hormuz-hedging.html.excerpt: Gold at $4,660, Bitcoin at $69K, oil at $112. A practical playbook for hedging your portfolio against a Strait of Hormuz closure.

05-nucor-deep-dive.html.excerpt: Nucor just announced its 9th straight price hike. The new tariff structure makes this a regime change, not a cycle. Here's the full thesis.

06-great-decoupling.html.excerpt: The S&P is near all-time highs while the 10-year sits at 4.34%. Small caps are leading. The traditional rates-stocks playbook just broke.
